Bash(python -c "import sys, json; jobs = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['jobs']; print\(jobs[0]['id'] if jobs else ''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Bids: {len\(d['bids']\)}, Asks: {len\(d['asks']\)}, Spread: {d['spread']}\\"\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; symbols = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total symbols: {len\(symbols\)}'\); print\('First 5:', [s['symbol'] for s in symbols[:5]]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; j=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"State: {j['state']}\\"\); print\(f\\"Vertices: {[\(v['name'][:50], v['status'], v['tasks']\) for v in j['vertices']][:2]}\\"\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Name: {v['name']}\\"\); print\(f\\"Status: {v['status']}\\"\); print\(f\\"Parallelism: {v['parallelism']}\\"\); print\(f\\"Now: {v['now']}, Start: {v['start-time']}, Duration: {v['duration']}ms\\"\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; apps = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Active apps: {len\([a for a in apps if a[\\"status\\"] == \\"RUNNING\\"]\)}'\); [print\(f\\"  - {a['name']}: {a['status']}\\"\) for a in apps[:5]]")
